reviews.review_description: Turning the Earth inside out, an observatory-like interface is attractive. An interactive adventure episodes are also fun experiences. Photos and narrations of various places are interesting, but it's unfortunate that it's not a stereoscopic picture. Merci Majerik!

Atlas Obscura VR offers a fascinating and immersive journey through unique real-world locations. The use of photogrammetry and 360° capture creates a strong sense of presence, making it a relaxing and enriching VR experience. Perfect for exploration lovers.

developer_response.body: Thanks for you kind words and so glad you are enjoying it.

reviews.review_title: Poor experience at every clunky step
reviews.review_description:
I bought it and was pretty disappointed. It’s a mixture of    mid resolution (pretty fuzzy) mono 360 images, some poorly modeled photogrammetry (no Gaussian splats) and video in 2D windows. 

Navigation is mostly by icons, but with some basic teleportation allowed in photogrammetry models. No turning options whatsoever - you need a swivel chair, apparently. Not great for those with mobility problems.

This experience would have been average 5 years ago. Now, it’s just embarrassing and a disservice to the medium.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your interest in the app and for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re sorry to hear you didn’t enjoy the experience and will take your comments on board as we continue to develop it further. We did want to note that the experience includes a significant amount of stereoscopic 360° video, and the entire menu environment (called the Atlasphere) is presented in 6DoF.

reviews.review_description:
I love what Brink did with their snippets of various places.  Atlas Obscura achieved a similar achievement with their haunted house (the various more in-depth 'episodes' are amazing), and the various places that I can click on the map.  

I WOULD ABSOLUTELY LOVE TO SEE MORE CONTENT! 

This isn't a criticism; it is a KEEP THIS GOOD THING GOING, and make it better!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review and your interest in Atlas Obscura VR. We are really glad you enjoyed it and are planning to continue the series into the future and add more content. Stay tuned and thanks again.

reviews.review_description: Definitely worth taking a deep dive into this one!!! Excellent… 🙏🏼

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review and interest in the Atlas Obscura VR app. We hope you continue to enjoy it.

reviews.review_description: I hope they keep adding to it. I've added some places to my bucket list. Enjoyed the content.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback and glad you are enjoying the app!

reviews.review_description: This app allows you to view/visit a number of interesting locations worldwide. Three or four mini-documentaries are presented in a variety of ways, from 360-degree video to fully scanned/rendered scenes; it's a true multi-media experience with extremely compelling content.  The mini-documentaries (for lack of a better turn) present detailed information and provide quite a bit of content.  Additionally, there are a ton of other locations you can "visit" around the globe with ample media & narration.  There's a LOT of content available.  I have no idea why this app isn't more popular but it's extremely well designed and presented.  If you like Brink Traveller, then Atlas Obscura should be your next purchase.  My only complaint is that although this can be enjoyed seated, there are scenes you MUST turn completely around to select specific scenes.  That aside, this is an incredibly interesting app that deserves far more reviews--it's really a top-tier experience.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback and we are really thrilled you are enjoying the app.

reviews.review_description: I've experienced a number of travel apps, but this one truly stands out! There is so much to explore and the locations are truly unique. I loved the book and I now love this incredible app. I hope the producers get to add even more to what is already a stunning achievement, BRAVO!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the wonderful review and we are so happy you are enjoying Atlas Obscura VR!

reviews.review_description: Finally an example of interactive, immersive entertainment that is not just a VR video. This app allws for exploration, immersion and discovery of many interest world known stories. Definitely worth the buy!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback and interest in Atlas Obscura VR. We agree that new content formats are required for immersive entertainment and so glad you enjoyed the app.
